speaker: Seeker
text: Subah se bas kamre mein roye ja raha hoon, dimaag ekdum sunn hai. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha, itna bura lag raha hai ki lagta hai main kabhi kisi ke layak nahi ban paunga. Bas rone ka mann kar raha hai, I just can't take this heavy feeling anymore.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional overwhelm using Lens F for Sequential coping.
text: Aapka dimaag ekdum sunn lag raha hai aur andar se itna heavy feel ho raha hai ki bas rone ka mann kar raha hai. Yeh bohot overwhelming lag raha hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, exactly. It's like a constant weight on my chest. Main kisi se baat bhi nahi kar sakta is baare mein. Sabko lagta hai main theek hoon, par andar hi andar I feel so broken. Agar kisi ko pata chala toh they'll just judge me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of judgment and isolation (Lens E) while responding to stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Andar ek bohot heavy weight hai, aur bahar sabke saamne sab normal dikhana pad raha hai kyunki judgment ka darr hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal raat Papa se bahut zyada behas hui. Ek aur rishta mana ho gaya aur wo keh rahe hain ki meri kundali mein hi koi dosh hai jo baat nahi ban rahi. I can't even tell them the real reason why I don't want these rishtas.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational tension and hiding the real self (Lens C).
text: Papa ke saath kal itni behas hui rishte aur kundali ke dosh ko lekar, aur sabse zyada hurt shayad is baat ka hai ki aap unhein asli wajah bata hi nahi pa rahe.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main ye sab nahi kar sakta. I feel suffocated jab wo log pandit aur kundali ki baatein karte hain. I feel like an alien in my own house. Meri reality itni alag hai unse, agar bol diya toh rishte hi toot jayenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of broken relationships and suffocation (Lens E) in response to stigma cue.
text: Ghar mein apna asli sach chhupana aur ye suffocation sehna pad raha hai, sirf is darr se ki agar sach samne aaya toh parivaar se rishte hamesha ke liye toot sakte hain...

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Papa ki health waise hi theek nahi rehti. Unka BP badh jata hai chhoti baaton par. Agar unhe meri sachai pata chali toh pata nahi kya hoga. Isliye dimaag ekdum sunn hai, I have nowhere to go.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask an open question based on the fear of hurting the father to deepen exploration.
text: Ek taraf apna sach hai aur doosri taraf Papa ki health ka darr, iske beech mein aap khud ko kitna akela mehsoos karte hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Bohot akela. I feel like there's a wall between me and the rest of the world. College mein mere kuch friends hain like me, par unhe bhi poori tarah nahi pata meri family situation. I feel like I'm living a double life.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of living a double life (Lens D - duration/ongoing reality) with a soft pause for stigma cue.
text: Dono alag alag zindagiyan jeeni pad rahi hain, jahan doston ke paas family ka sach nahi aur family ke paas aapka sach nahi...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur is double life ne mujhe completely exhaust kar diya hai. Roz subah uthna, face pe smile lana, rishton ke rejects par sad dikhne ka natak karna... mere andar ab himmat nahi bachi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Transition to Insight phase, naming the feeling of quiet resignation.
text: Lagta hai roz roz ye natak karte karte ek gehri thakan aur quiet resignation aa chuki hai, jahan bas thoda sa saans lene ki jagah chahiye.

speaker: Seeker
text: You really get it. Mujhe bas saans lene ki jagah chahiye thi aaj. Kamre mein band reh kar itna suffocating feel ho raha tha. Lagta tha my head will burst with all these thoughts.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize the exhaustion of masking identity in a typical family setup.
text: Aapka itna exhausted aur overwhelmed feel karna bilkul natural hai. Apne hi ghar mein lagatar ek mask pehen kar rakhna, khaskar jab parents ki taraf se rishton ka itna pressure ho, kisi ka bhi dam ghonta dega. Is thakan ka matlab ye nahi ki aap kamzor hain, bas burden bahut zyada hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: But aage kya? Kab tak ye mask pehen kar rahunga? Meri kundali ka dosh bata kar wo har roz mujhe blame karte hain. Main toh dosh hoon hi nahi na?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the separation of self-worth from the family's labeling (Lens E).
text: Aapko theek pata hai ki aap koi dosh nahi hain, phir bhi roz unke taane sun kar ye sawal satata hai ki kab tak is jhooth ke sahare jeena padega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi kaha. I know who I am. Par abhi ke liye ghar ka mahaul kaise theek karun? Papa se main sidhe munh baat tak nahi kar pa raha. Ab kya karoon jisse kam se kam aaj raat sukoon se nikal jaye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide 2 small, manageable actions to navigate the immediate evening tension.
text: Aaj raat ka sukoon zaroori hai. Do chhote options ho sakte hain: pehla, Papa ko bas ek glass paani ya chai de kar choti si baat karein, bina topic chhere, bas ek soft presence dikhane ke liye. Ya doosra, aaj sirf apne kamre mein koi aisi movie ya show dekhein jo aapko aapke true self ke kareeb laye aur thodi der ke liye dimaag shant kare.

speaker: Seeker
text: Chai wala idea theek lag raha hai. Topic na chhedna hi best hoga. Kam se kam unhe lagega ki I am not running away. Mujhe unhe hurt thodi karna hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the tea-giving step-by-step to solidify the plan.
text: Pehle kitchen mein ja kar aaram se ek cup chai banayein... phir chupchap unke paas rakh kar bas wahan ek minute ke liye baithein, bina kuch kahe... bas itna hi aaj ke liye kaafi hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Ye doable hai. Main itna hi karunga aaj. My mind feels a bit lighter now. Waise future ke baare mein soch ke abhi bhi thoda darr lagta hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the future anxiety (Lens D) while validating current calmness.
text: Aaj ke liye ek clear plan banne se dil thoda halka hua hai, halanki aane wale kal ko lekar thodi tension abhi bhi dimaag mein chal rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, but at least I know ek kadam kya lena hai. Thank you so much for listening to me today. I really needed this.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate Seeker's courage in sharing and seeking help.
text: Aapne apni sabse deeply hidden feelings aaj share ki, jo aasan nahi hota. Aapke andar is mushkil waqt ko navigate karne ki poori samajh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope things will get better over time. Main ab ja raha hoon chai banane Papa ke liye. Take care.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the positive step.
text: Aapka ek chhota sa kadam, Papa ke liye chai banana, aaj ki raat me thodi shanti zaroor layega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right, thank you. Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm closing.
text: Take care, apna dhyaan rakhna aaj raat.

speaker: Seeker
text: Will do. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final goodbye.
text: Goodbye. Zaroorat ho toh wapas message kar sakte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ending conversation space.
text: Mujhe umeed hai aaj ka din ab thoda behtar gurega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final acknowledgement.
text: Apna poora waqt lijiyega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, leaving now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close.
text: Take care.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End.
text: Hamesha yaad rakhein ki madad maangna ek bahaduri hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Bas ghabrahat ho rahi hai aur saans phool rahi hai. Kuch bhi sochna namumkin lag raha hai, bas ek ajeeb sa darr baith gaya hai aur dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. I am just so exhausted, I feel like I can't breathe anymore.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of overwhelm and blankness (Lens F) to validate the emotional flood.
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek ajeeb si bechaini aur darr bhar gaya hai, jisne sab kuch sunn aur overwhelming kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Yeah, exactly. It's like a constant weight. I feel so alienated from everyone. Agar kisi ko mere baare mein real baat pata chali toh pata nahi kya hoga. I feel so wrong all the time, just living a lie every single day.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feared consequence of being found out (Lens E) and respond to the stigma cue with a soft pause.
text: Apni sachai bahar aane ka darr itna gehra hai ki roz ek bojh lekar jeena pad raha hai, jahan sabse alag aur akela mehsoos hota hai...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Mummy ki baatein sun kar aur zyada dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai. Kal raat unhone phir shuru kar diya ki log kya kahenge... Itne saare rishtey laut rahe hain. I just can't deal with these rishtas anymore.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational tension around family pressure (Lens C).
text: Ghar mein jab lagatar ye shaadi aur rishton ka pressure aata hai, aur mummy logon ki baatein karti hain, toh wo pressure aur badh jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Pressure toh hai hi, but it's worse because unhone ab dhamki di hai. Keh rahi hain ki agar rishtey nahi dekhe toh meri bahar nikalne par aur pabandi lagayenge. I feel trapped. Kaise bataun unhe ki I don't fit into this heteronormative box?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration and feeling of being trapped by the restrictions (Lens D) responding to stigma.
text: Lagaatar is darr ke saaye mein jeena ki bahar nikalna band ho jayega, aur apni asli identity unhe na bata pana, ek pinjre jaisa lagta hoga...

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Pinjra hi hai. Meri asli identity chhupate chhupate main itna thak gaya hoon ki ab bas ghabrahat hoti hai. I just want to exist without being policed all the time. But in an Indian family, that feels impossible.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Move to insight by reflecting the quiet resignation that comes from hiding identity in a traditional family (C3+Sequential).
text: Lagta hai ek chupchap si thakan aur quiet resignation aa chuki hai, jahan baar baar apna sach chhupana aur akelepan ka bojh uthana ab saha nahi ja raha.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Resignation is the right word. Maine umeed hi chhod di hai ki wo kabhi mujhe samjhenge. Mummy ki baari toh bas 'log kya kahenge' ki hoti hai. Mera existence unke liye ek reputation ka issue ban gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the pain of being viewed as a reputation issue, separating Seeker's worth from family's reaction.
text: Aapka yeh hurt mehsoos karna bilkul jayaz hai, kyunki jab family aapki identity se zyada samaj ke darr ko aage rakhti hai, toh deeply akela lagta hai. Par unka 'log kya kahenge' wala darr unki khud ki conditioning hai, iska aapki reality ya aapke wajood se koi lena-dena nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for saying that. It's so hard to remember that when you are surrounded by it 24/7. Koi support system nahi hai ghar par. Sab bas meri shaadi karwa ke apna bojh halka karna chahte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the relational dynamic of feeling like a burden to the family (Lens C).
text: Ghar walon ka yeh attitude dekh kar ki shaadi bas ek responsibility nibhane ka tareeqa hai, aapko lagta hai ki aapki feelings ki unke liye koi jagah hi nahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai
text: Nahi hai unke paas jagah. Aur jab main na bolta hoon, toh unhe lagta hai main nakhre kar raha hoon. Kabhi kabhi toh itni anxiety hoti hai ki dimaag bilkul blank ho chuka hai, lagta hai koi mujhe sun hi nahi raha.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide a systemic anecdote about LGBTQ youth in Indian families facing similar rishta pressures.
text: Bahut se young queer logon ki zindagi mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—unhe lagatar aisi identity chhupani padti hai kyunki hamare samaj mein log kya kahenge wala darr sabse bada hota hai, jis wajah se apne hi ghar mein safe mehsoos karna mushkil ho jata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It genuinely helps to know I am not the only one facing this. I guess structural issue hai, unki puri upbringing hi aisi hui hai. But kal ke argument ke baad main abhi bhi shaken hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the lingering emotional impact of the argument (Lens D - duration).
text: Yeh samajhna zaroori hai ki bhale hi problem society ki hai, kal raat jo behas hui uska asar aur darr abhi bhi aapke andar poori tarah maujood hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main physically aur emotionally drained hoon. And she might bring it up again tonight. Kuch samajh nahi aa raha aage ka, ab kya karoon aaj shaam ke liye?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-confrontational strategies to manage the evening tension.
text: Aaj shaam ko thoda manage karne ke liye do chhote raaste ho sakte hain: pehla, agar mummy wapas topic shuru karein, toh ek neutral aawaz mein 'mujhe abhi theek nahi lag raha, baad mein baat karte hain' bol kar physically doosre kamre mein chale jayein. Doosra, thodi der headphones lagakar apna pasandida music sunein taaki woh blankness wali feeling thodi kam ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: I think the first one might trigger her more if I just leave. Headphones wala idea sounds safer. I can just say I have a headache and need to lie down listening to some music.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the headphones/headache strategy step by step.
text: Pehle ek glass paani pi lijiye... phir unse simply keh dijiye ki sirdard bahut tez hai... aur apne headphones lagakar bistar par let jayein, bas itna hi aaj ke liye kaafi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay, that's doable. Just completely avoid the conversation tonight. Main ladne ki energy mein nahi hoon waise bhi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the intention to protect energy (Lens E).
text: Aaj raat kisi bhi tarah ki behas se khud ko bachana aur apni bachi hui energy ko sambhalna hi sabse zaroori lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. And I will look up some online support groups too for the weekend. Pata hona chahiye ki aur log bhi is sab se deal kar rahe hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide brief systemic validation about seeking community support.
text: Online groups mein share karne se bahut rahat milti hai, kyunki jab apne jaise logon ki experiences sunte hain, toh yeh realise hota hai ki yeh isolation sirf society ka structure hai, aapki koi kami nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Makes sense. It is really validating to hear that. I think I can face the evening now without panicking.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the newfound confidence for the evening (Lens D).
text: Thodi der pehle jo panic tha, ab ek concrete plan hone ke baad aaj shaam nikalna thoda asaan lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Thank you so much for listening and understanding without judging me.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the gratitude.
text: Is safe space mein aapko bina judgment ke suna jana aapka haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main abhi ja kar let jaunga, music sun lunga. I will take it one day at a time.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate taking it one day at a time.
text: Ek waqt par sirf ek din ka sochna, aapke liye aage badhne ka sabse theek tareeqa hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I will. Thank you again. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Say goodbye warmly.
text: Mera saath humesha aapke liye maujood rahega jab bhi zaroorat ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: I will reach out if I feel overwhelmed again.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Confirm availability.
text: Bebijhak message kar sakte hain kisi bhi waqt, apna poora dhyaan rakhiyega.

speaker: Seeker
text: Good night.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing.
text: Good night, shanti aur sukoon se aaram karein.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final message.
text: Hamesha dhyan rahe ki aap akele nahi hain is safar mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon ki bas ek kone mein baithi hoon, na office ka kaam ho raha hai na kisi se baat karne ka mann hai. Flood of emotions itna zyada hai ki mujhe lag raha hai meri saari koshish aur meri asliyat sab mitti mein mil gayi. Bas rone ka mann kar raha hai aur screen dundhli ho rahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the feeling of being completely paralyzed by the emotional flood (Lens F).
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar itna bhari toofan chal raha hai, jisne poori tarah se sunn aur paralyze kar diya hai, aur andar sab kuch theher gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, I just feel like a complete failure. WFH chal raha hai, MS Teams pe messages aa rahe hain par main dekh hi nahi paa rahi. Andar itni heavy feeling hai... agar meri team ko pata chala ki main aise tuti hui hoon beech din mein, they'll think I am so unprofessional.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of professional judgment (Lens E) and respond to the stigma cue softly.
text: Apne professional image ko maintain karne ka darr aur andar ka itna overwhelming dard, dono ke beech akele struggle karna bahut bhari pad raha hoga...

speaker: Seeker
text: Kal raat ki ladaai ke baad se so nahi paayi hoon. Papa ne bol diya ki caste mismatch toh bahana hai, asal mein meri 'shakhsiyat' mein hi koi khot hai isliye rishtey nahi tikte. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon, I can't even process this. Meri izzat kuch nahi hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the deep relational hurt caused by the father's words (Lens C).
text: Kal raat jab Papa ne aapki shakhsiyat aur rishton ko lekar itni badi baat keh di, uske baad se aap khud ko ekdum bikhra hua aur hurt mehsoos kar rahi hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Mera poora existence sirf ek successful rishte par tik gaya hai unke liye. Main office mein ek puri team handle karti hoon, par ghar mein aate hi unhe lagta hai meri personality defective hai. I am just so tired of proving myself.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the exhaustion of living this dual reality over time (Lens D).
text: Lagatar office mein ek successful leader ki tarah perform karna aur phir ghar mein aakar har roz apne wajood ko saabit karne ki koshish karna, yeh chakkar thaka dene wala lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It exhausts me completely. Kabhi kabhi lagta hai shayad sach mein mujh mein hi koi kami hai. I can't even share this with my friends, sabki shaadi ho chuki hai. They won't understand my shame of being the 'defective' one.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the internal isolation and fear of being defective (Lens E) and respond to stigma cue softly.
text: Apne hi doston se doori aur andar hi andar is sharam ko akele sehna, kahin na kahin yeh darr baith gaya hai ki shayad aap mein hi koi kami hai...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon is thought se. I just sit and stare at my laptop. Kya fayda meri is job ka, is independence ka, agar mere apne parents mujhe defective samajhte hain just because I can't secure a match?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ask a question about the core conflict to transition to Insight.
text: Ek taraf aapki itni mehnat se banayi hui independent pehchaan, aur doosri taraf family ka yeh judgment—is takraav ke beech mein aap apne wajood ko kahan dekhti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kahin nahi. I feel like I belong nowhere. Office mein ek mask pehenna padta hai of a strong woman, aur ghar par ek defective beti ka tag. Mujhe ab kisi se ladne ki himmat nahi hai, I just want to disappear into my room.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect the quiet resignation born out of this duality.
text: Lagta hai roz roz in do alag duniya mein jeete jeete ek chupchap si resignation aa chuki hai, jahan ladne ki jagah bas thodi si shanti aur chup rehne ka mann karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Quiet resignation. Mujhe aur kuch nahi sunna, koi argument nahi karni Papa se. I am just tired. I just want to exist without being judged for my 'shakhsiyat'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that her worth is not tied to the family's traditional marriage lens.
text: Aapka itna thaka hua mehsoos karna bilkul jayaz hai. Jab ek working woman apne career mein itna effort dalti hai, aur family phir bhi use sirf rishtey aur izzat ke purane paimane par tolti hai, toh gehra dard hona swabhavik hai. Lekin unka aapki shakhsiyat par sawal uthana unki apni conditioning ka nateeja hai, aapki mehnat ya asliyat ki kami bilkul nahi.

speaker: Seeker
text: It feels relieving to hear that. Main sach mein khud ko hi blame karne lagi thi. But ab kya karoon? Ghar ka mahaul itna tense hai, mujhe sham ko drawing room mein jana hi hoga chai ke waqt. Aur meri himmat nahi pad rahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-confrontational options to handle the evening tea time.
text: Shaam ki chai wale waqt ko thoda aasan banane ke liye do chhote options try kar sakte hain: pehla, apna laptop ya notebook saath le kar bahar baithein, taaki ek clear signal mile ki aap kaam ke beech mein hain. Ya doosra, sirf apna chai ka cup le kar drawing room mein 5 minute rukiye aur jaldi se wapas apne kamre mein aa jayein 'meri ek urgent meeting hai' keh kar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Second option better lag raha hai. Main bs 5 minute ke liye jaungi, chai lungi and I will excuse myself. Main itni zyada overwhelmed hoon abhi bhi, I can't sit there for long.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through the chosen suggestion step-by-step.
text: Pehle gahri saans lijiye, apna mug lijiye, bas paanch minute wahan chupchap baithein, aur 'mera ek zaruri office call hai' bol kar bina kisi extra explanation ke wapas aa jayein... bas itna hi aaj shaam ke liye bahut hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Okay. Yes, I can do this. Ek chhota sa excuse aur main wapas apne room mein safe rahungi. Thoda sa darr lag raha hai par ho jayega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide systemic context to normalise her structural pressure.
text: Hamare yahan aksar betiyon ki independence ko family expectations aur izzat ke aage chhota dikhaya jata hai, isliye aapko jo pressure mehsoos ho raha hai wo kisi ek din ki kami nahi balki pure system ka bojh hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Sahi keh rahe hain aap. Systemic issue hi hai. Itna deep-rooted hai patriarchy ki unhe dikhta bhi nahi kitna hurt karte hain wo apni baaton se. I just need to protect my boundaries mentally.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror her goal to protect her mental space (Lens E).
text: Apne mental space ko in gehri patriarchal baaton se bacha kar rakhna aaj sabse badi zarurat ban gayi hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Aur shayad thoda time apne liye nikalna padega on weekends, just to detox from this environment. I used to paint, shayad wo wapas shuru karun.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the reconnecting to her identity through painting (Lens B).
text: Painting jaisi apni purani pasand ki taraf wapas lautna is thakan bhare mahaul se ek khoobsurat detox ho sakta hai, jahan aap sirf apne liye jee saktin hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: True. At least wahan koi mere strokes ko judge nahi karega. Koi meri shakhsiyat pe comment nahi karega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the safety and lack of judgment in her art (Lens F).
text: Bina kisi judgment ya comment ke apne art mein khona, ek bahut hi shant aur safe feeling deta hoga.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Ab thoda theek lag raha hai. Main abhi wapas ja rahi hoon, 5 min mein meri next meeting shuru hone wali hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the positive shift toward capability (Lens C).
text: Aapko meeting ke liye confidence ke saath wapas jate dekh kar mujhe bhi ek sukoon sa mil raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you. Aapne bahut dhyaan se suna mujhe. I was feeling completely lost when we started.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge the shift over time (Lens D).
text: Shuruat mein itna akela aur khoya hua mehsoos karne ke baad, ab aage ka ek clear rasta dekh pana badi baat hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Indeed. Thank you. I will prepare for my meeting now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror professional encouragement (Lens B).
text: Meeting ke liye poori taiyari kijiyega, aapki mehnat zaroor dikhegi wahan.

speaker: Seeker
text: Will do. Talk to you later if needed. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Confirm availability (Lens C).
text: Mujhe yahan hamesha aapke liye maujood payengi jab bhi baat karne ka mann kare.

speaker: Seeker
text: Take care. Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm goodbye (Lens C).
text: Alvida kehne se pehle apna poora dhyaan rakhna zaroor yaad rakhiyega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final closing statement (Lens E).
text: Jaate hue yaad rakhna ki aapki shakhsiyat aur aapki mehnat aapki sabse badi taqat hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Main itni toot chuki hoon ki bas sunn hokar leti hoon, na bhook lag rahi hai na pyaas. Bas ek gehra dard mehsus ho raha hai andar. Is waqt main kuch sochne ya koi solution dhoondne ke layak hi nahi bachi hoon. Pata nahi kya ho gaya hai mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional overwhelm using Lens F
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek bahut gehra dard thehar gaya hai, jisne poori tarah thaka diya hai aur sab kuch sunn kar diya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, ekdum khali lagta hai andar se. Main kisi se baat bhi nahi kar sakti, warna sab kahenge ki main jaanboojh kar drama kar rahi hoon attention ke liye. I just feel so worthless, jaise meri koi value hi nahi hai kisi ke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror feared consequence of judgement and pause for stigma cue
text: Andar se itna khali aur worthless mehsoos karna, aur upar se dusron ke judgment ka darr ki koi is dard ko drama na samajh le...

speaker: Seeker
text: Raat ko ladaai khatam hi nahi hui thi waise bhi. Mummy ne kaha ki dowry ki baatein toh baad mein aati hain, pehle ladka toh haan bole. Ye sunke bas yahi lagta hai ki main sabke liye ek bojh ban gayi hoon jisko bas nikalna chahte hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational element of mother's words
text: Apni hi mummy se itni chubhne wali baatein sunna, khaskar jab baat rishte ki rejection aur bojh banne ki ho, sach mein dil ko deeply hurt karta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Itne rishtey reject ho chuke hain ki mujhe ab khud se hi nafrat hone lagi hai. Jab bhi koi naya rishta aata hai, main bas sunn hokar leti hoon darr ke maare. I don't want to go through this humiliating process again.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time and duration of repeated rejections
text: Lagaatar itne time se baar-baar rejections ka samna karte rehne se, ab kisi naye rishte ke aane ke naam se hi wo darr aur sunn wali feeling dobara gher leti hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Aur ghar ka mahaul itna kharab ho gaya hai. Mujhe apne hi kamre mein saans lene mein takleef hoti hai. I just want to escape from this reality completely.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize mild risk and ask an open question to transition
text: Aise tension bhare mahoul mein ghutan aur saans rukna bilkul natural reaction hai. Jab lagatar ghar mein aisi energy bani ho, toh aap apne is dard ko process karne ke liye kya karti hain?

speaker: Seeker
text: Kuch nahi karti, main akeli hi roti rehti hoon raat bhar. Mujhe lagta tha ki meri independence aur padhai ki wajah se izzat milegi, par is family mein sab bekar gaya. I have given up on everything now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect quiet resignation due to unfulfilled identity
text: Lagta hai itne saalon ki mehnat ke baad jab izzat sirf ek rishte aur shadi se jodi ja rahi hai, toh ek chupchap si quiet resignation aa gayi hai aapke andar.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Maine aage argument karne ki umeed chhod di hai. Jo bolna hai unko bolne do. Main bas sunn hokar leti hoon ab, yahi mera defense ban gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate the structural burden over her personal worth
text: Aapka is tarah sunn pad jana aur umeed chhod dena poori tarah se samajh aata hai. Jab society aur family lagaatar aapko 'bojh' ki tarah dekhne ki koshish kare, toh aisi thakan hona laazmi hai, par aapki identity in sab se bahut zyada badhkar hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I know rationally, par mummy ki aawaz mere dimaag mein goonjti rehti hai. 'Pehle ladka toh haan bole'—it feels like I am just a product on a shelf waiting to be picked. It makes me feel sick.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Share systemic anecdote about women facing similar market-like dynamics
text: Working women ki zindagi mein yeh pattern bahut common hai—khud ki pehchaan banane ke baad bhi jab unhe shaadi ke 'market' ke hisaab se tol kar reject ya accept kiya jata hai, toh yeh self-worth pe bhari padta hai, aur koi ispe baat nahi karta kyunki ghar walon ko yahi system normal lagta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: It's so deeply unfair. Mujhe aaj apne kaam par bhi concentrate karna hai par kaise karun? Jab aisi draining conversations dimaag mein chal rahi hon toh insaan kaise aage badhe?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty and exhaustion
text: Ek taraf apne career ki responsibility nibhana aur doosri taraf ghar mein in lagatar taanon ka weight uthana, sach mein andar se bilkul nichod deta hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Exactly. Mujhe abhi bilkul samajh nahi aa raha aage kya karoon. Aaj sab ghar pe hain aur drawing room mein baithna padega dinner tak. Batao kya karoon?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide actionable, small steps to cope with family proximity
text: Aaj ke is tense mahoul ko handle karne ke liye do chhote tareeqe apna sakti hain: pehla, apne kamre ka darwaza adha band karke headphones lagakar apna kaam karein taki external noise kam ho jaye. Ya doosra, kisi zaruri call ka bahana banakar chhat par ya paas wale park mein thodi der walk ke liye nikal jayein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Park wala option theek lag raha hai. Mujhe thodi fresh air chahiye, warna yeh ghar ki ghutan mujhe poori tarah tod degi aaj.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through executing the park idea step by step
text: Pehle bas apne normal casual kapde pehan lijiye... phir mummy se bas itna keh dijiye ki 'mujhe thoda phone pe zaroori kaam hai, main bahar walk kar rahi hoon'... aur aaram se park ki taraf nikal jayein, aaj sirf is choti si cheez pe focus karte hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, main nikal sakti hoon waise. But mere andar ki wo 'bojh' wali constant feeling kaise kam hogi? It is literally paralyzing me from inside.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural validation regarding the bojh feeling
text: Hamare samaj mein jab ek ladki ki puri pehchaan shaadi aur dowry ki charcha se jod di jati hai, toh naturally bojh feel karvaya jata hai, par haqeeqat mein yeh aapki koi kami nahi hai, sirf unke dekhne ka ek purana nazariya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: That makes sense rationally. Par jab aapke apne khud aisi baatein bolein toh emotionally use reject karna is almost impossible.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the gap between rational understanding and emotional pain
text: Rationally sab samajhne ke baad bhi, apno se aisi baatein sunkar andar jo ek gehra dard baith gaya hai, use jhelna waqai bahut bhaari hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah. Abhi main thoda walk karke aati hoon. I need some space before I have to face them for dinner.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational boundary before dinner
text: Ghar walon ko dinner par wapas face karne se pehle, khud ko thoda space dena aur dimaag ko shant karna ekdam sahi kadam hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for listening. Aaj subah toh lag raha tha jaise sab kuch bilkul dark aur helpless hai. Aapse baat karke halka feel ho raha hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror transition over time
text: Subah itna hopeless aur dark mehsoos karne se lekar ab thoda sa halka pan paana, aapki khud ki himmat ko dikhata hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope park mein thodi shanti mile ab mujhe.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror hoped consequence
text: Umeed hai bahar ki khuli hawa mein ghar ke us mahoul se thodi doori aapko zaroori shanti degi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Agar dinner time phir mummy ne dowry wali baat shuru kardi toh main kaise respond karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the fear of recurrent fights
text: Raat ko wapas wahi argument aur dowry ki taane shuru hone ka darr abhi bhi peeche nahi chhut raha...

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, because ye unki habit hai khane ke waqt stress create karna.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Normalize not engaging as a valid self-protection method
text: Aksar families dinner ke waqt hi aisi tense baatein chhedti hain, par aapko us discussion mein respond karne ya energy lagane ki koi zarurat nahi hai agar aap nahi chahti hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Right. Main bas chupchap khana khaungi, unki baaton se disengage kar lungi. Jaise main apne kamre mein bas sunn hokar leti hoon, wahan bhi I will just disconnect mentally.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty and self-preservation
text: Apni bachi-kuchi energy ko us toxic discussion se bachane ke liye mentally khud ko wahan se hata lena aapke liye ek bahut zaroori shield ban gaya hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, it is my shield. Main ab nikal rahi hoon park. Take care and thank you.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Warm closing and presence
text: Dhyaan rakhiyega apna poori tarah se, main yahan maujood hoon jab bhi aage aapko baat karni ho.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon
text: Main itni zyada emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon ki dimaag mein bas wahi kadwi baatein cheekh rahi hain. Samajh nahi aa raha ki is urban isolation mein kisse baat karun, bas lag raha hai ki sab khatam ho gaya hai. Mera gala rone se bhar gaya hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror emotional overwhelm using Lens F
text: Aisa lag raha hai jaise andar ek bahut gehra toofan chal raha hai, jiski wajah se sab kuch overwhelming ho gaya hai aur bas akelepan aur despair ki feeling aa rahi hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon
text: Haan, it is exactly like a storm. I feel so alone in this city. Mere friends office mein hain, I can't just call them and cry about family drama. Agar kisi ko pata chalega ki meri shaadi nahi ho rahi aur family mujhe blame kar rahi hai, toh log mujhe hi defective samjhenge.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of judgment and stigma cue with soft pause (Lens E)
text: Bahar kisi ko apna yeh dard batane mein bhi darr lagta hai, is baat ka ki kahin log family ke tano ko sach na maan lein aur aapko hi galat na samajh lein...

speaker: Seeker
text: Wahi toh baat hai. Kal raat jab Papa ne kaha ki meri wajah se khandaan ki 'izzat' bazaar mein uchal rahi hai kyunki rishtey mana ho rahe hain... unhone mujhe poori tarah se tod diya. Meri independence, mera job, sab zero ho gaya unke liye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror relational element of father's words invalidating her worth (Lens C)
text: Jab Papa ne aapki saari independence aur mehnat ko andekha karke izzat aur rishton ko hi sab kuch bana diya, toh wo shabd andar tak chubh gaye.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon
text: Bahut zyada chubh gaye. Main pichle teen saal se ye sab sun rahi hoon. Har rishta reject hone pe mujhe sunaya jata hai jaise meri koi identity hi nahi hai. I am just a burden whose only purpose is to protect their 'izzat'.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror the duration of this suffering and loss of identity (Lens D)
text: Lagaatar teen saal se ye sunte sunte ki aapki aukaat sirf ek rishte aur family ki izzat se judi hai, yeh sab sach mein thaka dene wala hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I am exhausted. Mujhe samajh nahi aata main kya karun. Itni padhai likhai ka kya faida hua jab end mein apne hi ghar mein strangers jaisa treat kiya jata hai. Mere paas koi raasta nahi bacha ab.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Reflect quiet resignation due to lack of relational space
text: Lagta hai roz roz apni aukaat saabit karne ki koshish aur phir unhi tano ke beech mein ghutne se, ek chupchap si quiet resignation aa chuki hai.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: emotional flooding mehsus kar rahi hoon
text: Haan. Main waqai haar chuki hoon andar se. I can't fight them every day. Jab wo mujhe 'khandaan ka bojh' bulaate hain, toh dimaag mein itni tez flooding hoti hai ki main bas chup ho jaati hoon.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Validate that the burden is structural, separating her worth from their expectation
text: Aapka poori tarah se thak jana bilkul natural hai, kyunki jab ek strong aur independent woman ko family sirf apni 'izzat' bachane ka ek zariya manti hai, toh dil tootna laazmi hai. Par unka nazariya unki samajh tak seemit hai, ye aapki kimat kabhi tay nahi kar sakta.

speaker: Seeker
text: Thank you for understanding that. Urban isolation mein lagta tha shayad main hi overreact kar rahi hoon. It feels better to know ki kisi ne meri aawaz suni.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Disclose systemic nature of independent women feeling isolated regarding marriage pressures
text: Bahut si working women jo cities mein akele rehti hain, is pattern se guzarti hain—independence hone ke bawajood family ka rishton aur izzat wala pressure unhe deeply akela kar deta hai, par chupchap isliye sehti hain taaki koi aur judge na kare.

speaker: Seeker
text: That's exactly it. It is a shared reality, just never spoken about. But ab sach me bohot thakan ho chuki hai. Mujhe raat ko ek aur unki call aani hai about some new rishta, aur meri himmat nahi hai usse face karne ki.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror fear of anticipated clash (Lens E)
text: Raat ki us aane wali call ka darr aur dobara wahi baatein sunne ka anticipation abhi se ek bojh jaisa lag raha hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, I can already feel my chest tightening. Main abhi office ka kaam bhi dhang se nahi kar paa rahi. Ab kya karun sham ke liye? I want to avoid another argument.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Offer small, non-confrontational ways to manage the evening call
text: Shaam ki us call ko thoda aasan banane ke liye do options try kar sakte hain: pehla, jab call aaye toh ekdum se 'mujhe thoda important deadline ka kaam hai, kal aram se baat karte hain' bolkar respect ke sath call choti kar dein. Ya doosra, phone silent par rakh dein aur kal subah ek simple text bhej dein ki 'main kaam mein phansi thi, baad mein connect karte hain'.

speaker: Seeker
text: First option better hai. Agar phone nahi uthaya toh wo panicking start kar denge aur taane badh jayenge. Main unhe respectfully excuse kar dungi kaam ke bahane.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Walk through executing the short call strategy
text: Bas aaram se ek gehri saans lijiye jab call baje... normal tone mein uthakar kahiye 'Papa, office ka ek zaruri kaam aa gaya hai, hum kal araam se baat karte hain'... aur gently phone rakh dijiye, aaj raat ke liye sirf itna hi.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeah, I can do this. Main zyada unki details sunungi hi nahi so there won't be any flooding. I have to protect my mental peace today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror duty towards self-preservation (Lens B)
text: Aaj ke liye apni mental peace ko bachana hi aapki sabse badi zaroorat aur responsibility hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Indeed. Aapse baat karke mujhe ek clear head space mila. Warna subah se I was just spiraling into self-blame.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Provide structural validation regarding self-blame
text: Hamare samaj mein jab ek ladki ki puri worth shaadi se attach ki jati hai, toh wo naturally self-blame karne lagti hai jab rishtey theek nahi hote, par haqeeqat mein yeh aapki koi kami nahi balki ek flawed expectations ka nateeja hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes, I am starting to see that now. Meri identity is mere job aur meri khud ki struggles se bani hai, kisi rishte ke acceptance se nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror time shift from despair to clarity (Lens D)
text: Subah ke us gehre darr aur toofan se nikal kar, ab apni identity ko wapas pehchanna aapke lamba safar tay karne ka saboot hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: I hope things will slowly get better as I enforce these boundaries. Thanks for being there for me today.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge gratitude and presence (Lens C)
text: Aapki baat sunna aur is mushkil safar mein thoda saath dena mera haq hai.

speaker: Seeker
text: Take care. I will log off and make myself some tea now.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mirror hoped consequence of tea (Lens E)
text: Ek garam chai ka cup zaroor thodi aur shanti aur sukoon dega aapko.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yes. Talk to you later if things get tough again.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Confirm availability (Lens D)
text: Jaise hi phir kabhi overhwleming lage, aap wapas yahan laut sakti hain bina kisi darr ke.

speaker: Seeker
text: Bye.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Close warmly (Lens F)
text: Apna dhyaan rakhiyega is shanti ke pal mein.

speaker: Seeker
text: Will do.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Acknowledge agreement (Lens C)
text: Alvida kehne se pehle yaad rakhiyega aap khud mein kaafi hain.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Final goodbye (Lens E)
text: Umeed hai shaam ab theek guzregi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: End
text: Take care.
